title: astragalus gilvus
intro: Astragalus gilvus, also known as Yellow Milk Vetch or Yellow Milk Vetch Astragalus, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory effects, which help to improve the body's ability to resist stress and disease. Astragalus gilvus has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and pneumonia, as well as to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
